info.name: Techno Online Store - Reviews API
info.description:
Reviews API for tenant store customers.

Base URL: {{tenant_url}}/api

Set `tenant_url` to the tenant subdomain, e.g. `https://store1.example.com`

request.description: Submit a review for a product. Requires authentication. The user must have a delivered order containing the product. One review per user per product.

response.name: Success (201)
Validation Error (422)
Not Eligible (403)
Already Reviewed (422)

request.description: Get paginated approved reviews for a product by slug. Public endpoint, no authentication required.

response.name: Success (200)
